overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white coat exploring a spaceship interior. The character moves from compact living quarters through a metal corridor past a stationary NPC, and approaches a large circular airlock door that opens to reveal an exterior docking bay.

events.description: character turns left and walks toward the exit doorway

agents.ego_description: moving through a compact living space with a dining table, passing a yellow couch on the left toward an exit

small spherical lamp on wall-mounted shelves
wall-mounted storage shelves with various items

doorway leading to corridor with metal frame

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a dimly lit crew quarters featuring a dining table, wall shelves with an orange lamp, and a yellow couch. The character walks forward and turns left, approaching an exit doorway that leads out of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship office corridor with hazard markings

events.description: exits living quarters and enters the metal corridor
passes NPC crew member standing against the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking down an industrial corridor with warning-striped flooring, passing a crew member standing near the ship office sign

notable_agents.action: standing against the wall near the ship office sign, watching the player pass

entered.detail: illuminated wall sign reading SHIP OFFICE
gray metal wall panels with industrial rivets
floor with yellow and black hazard stripes
large circular pressure door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the living quarters into a narrow industrial corridor with hazard-striped flooring. A crew member stands against the left wall near a SHIP OFFICE sign. The character walks past the NPC toward a large circular airlock door visible at the far end of the corridor.

events.description: large circular airlock door begins to rotate and open
airlock door fully opens revealing the exterior docking bay area

agents.ego_description: approaching the airlock door and pausing as the heavy circular mechanism rotates open to reveal the outside

entered.detail: massive circular metal pressure door with rotating locking mechanism
mechanical arms and gears operating the door
bright exterior area visible through the opening door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive circular airlock door at the end of the corridor. The door's mechanical locking mechanism rotates and the heavy metal portal slowly opens, revealing a bright exterior docking bay beyond. The character waits as the door completes its opening cycle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit interior of crew quarters into the expansive brightness of an exterior docking bay. It begins inside a living space featuring a dining table and a yellow couch, moving forward and turning left toward an exit doorway. As the character steps through the threshold, the environment shifts into a narrow industrial corridor with hazard-striped flooring and a crew member standing near a ship office sign. The camera then advances down the hall toward a massive circular airlock door, which begins to rotate its mechanical locking mechanism. Finally, the heavy metal portal slowly slides open, transitioning the scene from the enclosed corridor to the brilliant light of the docking bay beyond.
